options.name: Movement
options.description: Configure the keys used to control the game.

options.name: Left
options.description: Set the key for moving left.

options.name: Down
options.description: Set the key for moving down.

options.name: Up
options.description: Set the key for moving up.

options.name: Right
options.description: Set the key for moving right.

options.name: Accept
options.description: Change the key used to confirm selections.

options.name: Back
options.description: Change the key used to go back or cancel.

options.name: Pause
options.description: Set the key used to pause the game.

options.name: Max Frames
options.description: Enable or disable maximum frame rate.

options.name: Low Quality
options.description: Reduce graphics quality for better performance.

options.name: GPU Caching
options.description: Enable GPU caching for faster rendering.

options.name: Resolution
options.description: Set the resolution of the game.

options.name: Master Volume
options.description: Adjust the master volume of the game.

options.name: Music Volume
options.description: Adjust the volume of the background music.

options.name: SFX Volume
options.description: Adjust the volume of sound effects.
